source.reference: Litz-estimated G7 for 9.3×64mm Brenneke 285gr pointed solid. Litz, Ballistic Performance of Rifle Bullets, 3rd Ed. §9.7. Form factor i≈0.95 for modest meplat. No Doppler-published BC for this caliber.
source.methodology: BC values estimated from similar known projectiles using form factor approximations or Litz estimation methods. Not directly measured or published.
